svg.title: sankey diagram
svg.desc: A diagram with 7 nodes and 8 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: Source A, Process X, Process Y.. Key relationships: Source A points to Process X with label: 100; Source A points to Process Y with label: 50; Source B points to Process X with label: 75.. Layout spans 745 by 3802 units with 7 rendered node boxes and 8 routed edge paths.
